detail.name: 2027 Institutional Securities Technology Summer Analyst Program - Software Engineering
locations: New York, New York, United States of America
detail.job_description:
Morgan Stanley Technology Summer Analysts build production software for trading, risk, and market data platforms.

You will work with engineers on distributed systems in Java, Python, and C++. Candidates should be pursuing a BS or MS in Computer Science or related field.
